title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business | TechCrunch
summary: The company’s profit hit $112.1 billion, which is a massive jump from this time last year, when the company reported $28.1 billion in profit, the company’s earnings report shows. This marks the company’s 12th consecutive quarter of double-digit revenue growth.
